'''N'croth''' was the capital city on the planet of [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]]. On the outskirts was the [[H'drachi Ghetto]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> An Imperial garrison was transformed from the governmental palace by Governor [[Grigor (governor)|Grigor]].

{{City-stub}}
